commodities.name: Padi Ciherang
commodities.description: Padi varietas Ciherang unggulan Jawa Barat. GKP grade A.
commodities.data_source: BPS Feb 2024 - harga GKP tertinggi Rp7.268/kg
commodities.hpp_note: HPP GKP berlaku sejak 15 Jan 2025 (Kepka Bapanas No.14/2025)

commodities.name: Kopi Arabika Gayo
commodities.description: Green bean Arabika Gayo specialty grade. 40% produksi arabika nasional.

commodities.name: Kopi Robusta Gayo
commodities.description: Green bean Robusta Gayo. Harga tertinggi dalam sejarah karena kelangkaan.
commodities.data_source: TribunGayo Jan 2025: green bean Rp60.000/kg (Des2024 sempat Rp67.000)

commodities.name: Bawang Merah Brebes
commodities.description: Bawang merah sentra nasional Brebes. Eceran nasional Mar 2026: Rp42.876/kg.
commodities.data_source: Bapanas Panel Harga Mar 2026: eceran Rp42.876/kg; harga petani estimasi 60-70%

commodities.name: Cabai Rawit Merah
commodities.description: Cabai rawit merah segar. Eceran nasional Mar 2026: Rp79.371/kg (Bapanas).
commodities.data_source: Bapanas Panel Harga Mar 2026: eceran Rp79.371/kg; harga petani estimasi ~50%

commodities.name: Jagung Hibrida
